scripts.simulate:reputation: cre workflow simulate --target local-simulation --config config.json reputation-oracle/index.ts
scripts.simulate:monitor: cre workflow simulate --target local-simulation --config config.json transaction-monitor/index.ts
scripts.simulate:budget: cre workflow simulate --target local-simulation --config config.json budget-alert/index.ts
scripts.simulate:verify: cre workflow simulate --target local-simulation --config config.json agent-verify/index.ts
scripts.simulate:all: bun run simulate:reputation && bun run simulate:monitor && bun run simulate:budget && bun run simulate:verify
